name: Hellfire Boots
description:
These heavy boots are made of blackened metal and always feel warm to the touch, with streams of glowing embers cascading off their heels. While wearing hellfire boots, you gain resistance 10 to fire damage.

Activate—Devil's Dance 2 (manipulate)

Frequency once per minute

Effect You Stride. Each square you move through during your Stride is scorched with hellish flames, becoming hazardous terrain for 1 minute. A creature that moves through one of these spaces takes ] damage.
